audit_items.proof_trace: nfp_bpf_ndo_uninit() is a 6-line void function that performs zero heap allocations — it only calls bpf_offload_dev_netdev_unregister(). Since the universal quantifier 'forall alloc(p)' ranges over an empty set, the property holds vacuously. There are no error paths and no memory management obligations in this function.
